creator: infofarmer@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 2/23/07, Jin-Shan Tseng <tjs@cdpa.nsysu.edu.tw> wrote:
> -BUILD_DEPENDS= ${SITE_PERL}/POE.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-POE
> -RUN_DEPENDS:=  ${BUILD_DEPENDS}
> +RUN_DEPENDS=   ${SITE_PERL}/POE.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-POE

We've already discussed this. In general I don't
mind if you ignore my recommendations altogether,
but I do mind two things:
1. These patches being committed after a time-out
   if I get hit by a truck
2. Other committers spending time on explaining
   what you do wrong

Other than that, thanks for an update, I'll commit
it in a few moments.

Cheers!
